figures.caption: Figure 4: Per-instance makespan comparison. Blue points show refined makespan with ±1 std error bars. Orange and green markers denote the baseline makespan with ā = {0.9, 0.995}.

Figure 2: Shared-encoder actor-critic architecture. Region, node, and edge features are encoded separately and concatenated before being processed by a message-passing GNN. The resulting node embeddings are used by separate actor and critic heads to produce Gaussian policy parameters and value estimates.
